text: Hey John, I am recording this video to show you that I have now updated the BOL number and the PRO number. Now they can track the status of our shipment. It already shows that it's shipped. It may not be real time, but they will eventually update here. So what I want to point out now is. Oh well, if I refresh you will also see. It's all right. Now they are not asking for the tracking ID anymore. Now what I would say is I am done with my part. That includes category approval and then brand name approval, listing the product and then creating the shipment, giving you all the labels. All those things are done as the next steps. What you need to do is you need to go to inventory and shipments if you want to track the status. It will, it will of course take time. You know how long it will take for almost 60 days, right? So go here and after when it's almost there. I mean you can of course keep in touch with the carrier I believe. So when it's almost 60 days you can maybe get some update from them. And also take here. When they have delivered to Amazon you can come to this page here from inventory and shipments. And then this is the one that this one is canceled. So only one that you have is this one. You can click on it and see if they have updated any shipping shipment events here. And then once they start receiving it will also show the how many they have received. If you go to the contents tab you can also see the same update. I don't know why it's showing receiving, but anyway so this is all you have to do. So my request now to you is all. I have done everything that I needed to do for you. So can you now send an email to Freeup team and let them know that the job is complete. If you still need any support from me regarding this shipment, I'm happy to answer your questions. But it will be great if you can confirm with free app and let them know that my part is done so that they can release the payment to me. I believe you already had to pay. Now if you confirm them, they will release the payment to me. Well, that is all for now. Thank you so much. It's been a pleasure working with you. Bye for now.
